chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 159 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.660/2024 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 27.08.2024 Mr. Asadullah Soomro, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through this petition, the petitioner has impugned order dated 08.01.2024 passed by the Additional District Judge, Mirwah in Summary Suit No.96 of 2022 (Re: Nawaz Ali versus Khalil Ahmed), whereby an application under Section 151 CPC filed by the petitioner was dismissed. Admittedly, this petition is filed against a private person, which in fact, is not maintainable under Article 199 of the Constitution of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973, and is accordingly dismissed. However, the petitioner is at liberty to avail legal remedies in accordance with law. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
